Actually, this conflicts with another patch using:

 LCME_FL_PARITY    = 0x00000080

so it would be better to use 0x100 for the PIN flag.

commit.subject: LU-15693 flr: add component pin flag
commit.message:
LU-15693 flr: add component pin flag

Reserve the flag for further usage.
